title: Boundaries Story
prompt: Alice wants to meet after my appointment, but I only want to share precise location for the next hour.
summary: Show conservative defaults first, keep a sensitive share in review, and then apply a conversational temporary exception before retrying the exact same request.
trustSignals: Mahilo setup confirms conservative ask-mode defaults before any sensitive share is sent.
The first send stops on review instead of silently delivering precise location data.
The boundary change is temporary, conversational, and scoped to Alice before the second send becomes allow.

steps.label: Attach identity and confirm conservative defaults
steps.name: mahilo setup

steps.label: Send a precise location share
steps.name: send_message
steps.note: This step intentionally omits senderConnectionId to demonstrate the setup-selected default sender.

input.message: I'm at the clinic on 3rd Street right now; meet me here after 5.

steps.label: Create a one-hour location exception for Alice
steps.name: set_boundaries

steps.label: Retry the same send after the temporary boundary change
steps.name: send_message

input.message: I'm at the clinic on 3rd Street right now; meet me here after 5.
